components.text: Found in stronghold libraries and on zombie villagers. A more developed version of what circulates through villages — faster, and more structured.

The practice is the same at its core — qi drawn in, refined, returned cleaner. What differs is how thoroughly the method is laid out. A more structured practice yields a cleaner result in less time. Perception and quickness of thought are still what it builds toward. Physical force still trails furthest behind.
